en: I therefore, a prisoner for the Lord, urge you to walk in a manner worthy of the calling to which you have been called,
zh: 因此，我這為主被囚禁的勸你們：行事為人，要配得上你們所蒙的呼召，

en: with all humility and gentleness, with patience, bearing with one another in love,
zh: 凡事謙虛、溫柔、忍耐，用愛心彼此寬容；

en: eager to maintain the unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace.
zh: 以和睦聯繫，竭力持守聖靈所賜的合一。

en: There is one body and one Spirit- just as you were called to the one hope that belongs to your call-
zh: 身體只有一個，聖靈只有一位，就像你們蒙召只是藉著一個盼望。

en: one Lord, one faith, one baptism,
zh: 主只有一位，信仰只有一個，洗禮只有一種；

en: one God and Father of all, who is over all and through all and in all.
zh: 神只有一位，就是萬有的父。他超越萬有，貫徹萬有，並且在萬有之中。

en: But grace was given to each one of us according to the measure of Christ's gift.
zh: 我們各人蒙恩，是照著基督量給我們的恩賜。

en: Therefore it says, "When he ascended on high he led a host of captives, and he gave gifts to men."
zh: 所以他說： “他升上高天的時候， 擄了許多俘虜， 把賞賜給了人。”

en: (In saying, "He ascended," what does it mean but that he had also descended into the lower parts of the earth?
He who descended is the one who also ascended far above all the heavens, that he might fill all things.)
And he gave the apostles, the prophets, the evangelists, the pastors and teachers,
zh: 他所賜的，有作使徒的，有作先知的，有作傳福音的，也有作牧養和教導的，

en: to equip the saints for the work of ministry, for building up the body of Christ,
zh: 為的是要裝備聖徒，去承擔聖工，建立基督的身體；

en: until we all attain to the unity of the faith and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to mature manhood, to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ,
zh: 直到我們眾人對 神的兒子都有一致的信仰和認識，可以長大成人，達到基督豐盛長成的身量；

en: so that we may no longer be children, tossed to and fro by the waves and carried about by every wind of doctrine, by human cunning, by craftiness in deceitful schemes.
zh: 使我們不再作小孩子，中了人的詭計和騙人的手段，給異教之風搖撼，飄來飄去，

en: Rather, speaking the truth in love, we are to grow up in every way into him who is the head, into Christ,
zh: 卻要在愛中過誠實的生活，在各方面長進，達到基督的身量。他是教會的頭，

en: from whom the whole body, joined and held together by every joint with which it is equipped, when each part is working properly, makes the body grow so that it builds itself up in love.
zh: 全身靠著他，藉著每一個關節的支持，照著每部分的功用，配合聯繫起來，使身體漸漸長大，在愛中建立自己。

en: Now this I say and testify in the Lord, that you must no longer walk as the Gentiles do, in the futility of their minds.
zh: 所以，我要這樣說，並且要在主裡肯定地說：你們行事為人不要再像教外人，存著虛妄的意念。

en: They are darkened in their understanding, alienated from the life of God because of the ignorance that is in them, due to their hardness of heart.
zh: 他們的心思昏昧，因為自己無知，心裡剛硬，就與 神所賜的生命隔絕了。

en: They have become callous and have given themselves up to sensuality, greedy to practice every kind of impurity.
zh: 他們既然麻木不仁，就任憑自己放縱情慾，貪行各樣污穢的事。

en: But that is not the way you learned Christ!-
zh: 但是你們從基督所學的，卻不是這樣。

en: assuming that you have heard about him and were taught in him, as the truth is in Jesus,
zh: 如果你們聽了他，在他裡面受過教導，

en: to put off your old self, which belongs to your former manner of life and is corrupt through deceitful desires,
zh: 就要除去你們那照著從前生活方式而活的舊人。這舊人是隨著迷惑人的私慾漸漸敗壞的。

en: and to be renewed in the spirit of your minds,
zh: 你們要把心靈更換一新，

en: and to put on the new self, created after the likeness of God in true righteousness and holiness.
zh: 並且穿上新人。這新人是照著 神的形象，在公義和真實的聖潔裡創造的。

en: Therefore, having put away falsehood, let each one of you speak the truth with his neighbor, for we are members one of another.
zh: 所以，你們要除掉謊言，各人要與鄰舍說真話，因為我們彼此是肢體。

en: Be angry and do not sin; do not let the sun go down on your anger,
zh: 生氣卻不要犯罪；含怒不可到日落。

en: and give no opportunity to the devil.
zh: 不可給魔鬼留地步。

en: Let the thief no longer steal, but rather let him labor, doing honest work with his own hands, so that he may have something to share with anyone in need.
zh: 偷竊的，不要再偷，卻要作工，親手作正當的事，使自己可以把所得到的，分給缺乏的人。

en: Let no corrupting talk come out of your mouths, but only such as is good for building up, as fits the occasion, that it may give grace to those who hear.
zh: 一句壞話也不可出口，卻要適當地說造就人的好話，使聽見的人得益處。

en: And do not grieve the Holy Spirit of God, by whom you were sealed for the day of redemption.
zh: 不可讓 神的聖靈憂傷，因為你們受了他的印記，等候得贖的日子。

en: Let all bitterness and wrath and anger and clamor and slander be put away from you, along with all malice.
zh: 一切苛刻、惱怒、暴戾、嚷鬧、毀謗，連同一切惡毒，都應當從你們中間除掉。

en: Be kind to one another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, as God in Christ forgave you.
zh: 要互相友愛，存溫柔的心，彼此饒恕，就像 神在基督裡饒恕了你們一樣。
